question: Is there a rectangular glass display case with a black metal frame positioned at the center of the frame?
Are subtle reflections visible along the glass edges of the display case?
Is the bottom of the display case lined with deep red velvet padding that has a visible plush texture?
Are there exactly 2 vases positioned left of center inside the display case?
Is the front vase tall, slender, and blue-and-white porcelain with a glossy glaze finish?
Is the back vase slightly shorter, rounder, and patterned with fluorescent orange in an imitation blue-and-white style?
Is the back vase positioned behind the front vase near the left back corner with a small gap separating them?
Are there exactly 2 bronze daggers lying flat on individual black stands to the right of the vases?
Does the upper dagger have green patina on the blade and is its tip pointing to the right?
Does the lower dagger have a bright blue sheath and is its tip pointing to the left?
Are there exactly 7 ancient coins scattered in front of the daggers?
Are the coins distributed across exactly 3 small transparent display trays?
Are 2 coins slightly overlapping on the edge of the same tray?
Are the coins predominantly gold-colored, with the rightmost coin displaying rainbow oxidation colors?
Are there exactly 2 carved stone tablets standing upright to the right of the center?
Is the front stone tablet a gray slab with chipped edges?
Is the back stone tablet a light blue-gray slab with fine carved texture, positioned slightly tilted?
Are there exactly 3 ammonite fossils positioned below the stone tablets on individual small black bases?
Is the leftmost ammonite fossil light brown (natural color)?
Are the 2 ammonite fossils on the right dyed mint green with clear spiral patterns?
Are there transparent acrylic information cards placed symmetrically on the left and right inner sides of the case (one on each side)?
Are there exactly 2 silver metal stanchion poles (one left, one right) topped with round balls outside the case?
Are the stanchion poles connected by a fluorescent yellow-green rope forming an arc?
Is there a white dome-shaped security camera mounted in the upper right corner with its lens directed toward the display case?
Is there a black track spotlight in the upper left of the frame?
Does the spotlight cast a focused light spot specifically on the upper half of the front vase?
Is there a brass wall sconce with a milky white shade on the right wall emitting soft light?
Is the flooring dark wood with a clear reflection visible directly beneath the display case?
